# Journal Lock

> Journal Lock: Focus & Detox is a free iPhone app (iOS 17+) that locks your most
> distracting apps — Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, games — and unlocks them only after
> you write a daily journal entry. It is an app blocker and a private journal in one:
> write to earn your screen time, build a journaling streak, and stop doomscrolling
> without deleting your apps.

Last-Modified: 2026-07-11

## What it does

- Locks apps you choose at a daily time you set, using Apple's Screen Time framework
- A short journal entry (minimum 10 words) unlocks all locked apps until the next lock time
- Daily personalized prompts and mood check-ins (Awful → Great scale) with a mood-over-time chart
- Streak tracking with milestone celebrations; a sprout mascot gains health when you journal and shrinks when you skip
- Journal is private: entries stored locally on device, optional passcode, no cloud, no accounts, no ads
- Home screen widget shows your latest entry

## Pricing

Free to download and use. Journal Lock Pro (optional): $5.99/week or $79.99/year with a
3-day free trial — unlimited entries, premium themes, advanced features.

## Key facts

- Platform: iPhone and iPad, iOS 17.0 or later
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/journal-lock-focus-detox/id6759090015
- Category: Lifestyle / Productivity
- Developer: Pranav Ambwani
- The science: affect labeling — writing about emotions reduces the brain's stress
  response; consistent journaling is linked to lower anxiety and better focus
